programs.title: Road absurdities
programs.desc: In the next season of the program, Kamil Jaśkowski and Krzysztof Ruszała will face construction negligence, lack of imagination, and sometimes simple stupidity, which still abounds on Polish roads.They will take a closer look at modern highways, city streets, but also local roads.In addition to pointing out irregularities, they will work with experts to look for ways to solve problems.There will be interventions in offices, construction contractors and road managers.The leaders will be wherever things go wrong and Polish drivers, cyclists, pedestrians and motorcyclists suffer.The program is based on reports from viewers who report road absurdities in various parts of the country.

programs.title: Wheeler Dealers 4
programs.desc: Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore a damaged car.They try to renovate and sell used vehicles of various brands at a profit.

programs.title: Wheeler Dealers 4
programs.desc: Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore a damaged car.They try to renovate and sell used vehicles of various brands at a profit.

programs.title: Misfit Garage 2
programs.sub_title: Muddy revenge on the Willys Jeep
programs.desc: The team of mechanics from Fired-Up Garage takes on new challenges.In the meantime, they also have to face completely different problems, such as the theft of tools.Working together gives them a lot of satisfaction.

programs.title: Feds
programs.desc: An insightful look at the FBI through interviews with active employees.Viewers hear about high-profile cases told by agents, informants, undercover agents and even crime victims.

programs.title: Steel Buddies
programs.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.
